name: Sweet & Tangy Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crisp, about 5-8 minutes.
2. Remove with a slotted spoon, reserving bacon drippings in the pan.
3. Drain bacon on paper towels, crumble and set aside.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. Dredge the chicken pieces in flour (season to taste, shake off excess).
6. Place skillet with the reserved bacon drippings over low heat; add the chicken pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 10 minutes.
7. Transfer chicken to a medium casserole dish (8x8) and bake uncovered for 30 minutes.
8. In a small bowl combine the honey, dijon mustard, curry powder, salt, and ground cayenne to taste.
9. Drizzle honey mixture over the chicken and bake another 15 minutes.
10. Top with bacon just before serving.
Notes: Tried 08/14/98 - This is delicious. The chicken was so tender you could cut it with a fork. I seasoned the flour with about 2 pinches of my Cajun seasoning. Serve with rice (long grain or wild) to soak up the wonderful sauce.
